page_metadata.biotools__summary: An algorithm for improving resolution of cryo-electron microscopy. It enables to correct anisotropic image motion at the single pixel level across the whole frame, suitable for both single particle and tomographic images
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An algorithm for improving resolution of cryo-electron microscopy. It enables to correct anisotropic image motion at the single pixel level across the whole frame, suitable for both single particle and tomographic images
